## CHOROPLETH chart, SHILPA style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-SPA-01",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "magnitude",
    "pattern"
  ],
  "form": "supplied region polygons filled by a deterministic value ramp",
  "data_required": "region polygons (author-supplied geometry) + one value per region",
  "family": "SPA",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-RNK-01 (values without geography)",
    "CH-SPA-02 (absolute counts)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "geography adds nothing to the message",
      "use": "CH-RNK-01"
    },
    {
      "when": "absolute counts, not rates",
      "use": "CH-SPA-02"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- rates and intensities across known territories
- where-is-it-worst questions for map-literate audiences

Do NOT use when:
- absolute counts (big areas lie; CH-SPA-02)
- territories the audience cannot recognize

```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first region value",
  "note": "coordinates are author-supplied unit-square (0-100) geometry; the renderer scales, the author owns projection and aspect",
  "regions": "[{name, polygon: [[x,y]..], label_at: [x,y], value}]"
}
```

### Rules
- fill is the deterministic background-to-high ramp; the value key is printed
- every region labeled with name and value on the map
- geometry is data: the same polygons re-render identically forever

### Never do this
- rainbow choropleths
- absolute counts on area fills
- unlabeled regions
- 3D extrusion

### QA before delivering
- [ ] ramp key printed
- [ ] values on the map
- [ ] polygons closed
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FBFDFF` |
| fill_high | `#1B6E8F` |
| label | `#33424E` |
| title | `#143D59` |
| source | `#33424E` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 600
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
